name: Double Cheese Wheel
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Marinated Artichoke Hearts, Drained and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
You should get 1 whole wheel of Cheese that weighs 1 lb.
Artichoke Hearts should be drained and chopped.
Fresh Basil Leaves should be snipped; Dried Basil Leaves should be crumbled.
Remove any wax coating or rind from the cheese. Hollow out the cheese with a knife or spoon, leaving a 1/2-inch thick shell on the sides and bottom; reserve the cheese shell. Finely chop enough of the scooped-out cheese to measure 1 cup (reserve any extra for another use). Place 1 cup chopped cheese, the cream cheese, artichoke hearts, 3 T of pine nuts, and the basil in the work bowl fitted with a steel blade. Process until well mixed. Pack the mixture into the cheese shell. Sprinkle with remaining 1 T pine nuts; press lightly. Cover and refrigerate until firm, about 3 hours. Cut into thin wedges. Serve with assorted crackers if desired.
